critic_verdicts.deviations: MaskBuffer API differs from plan (no n_kinds field); allow(dead_code) on src/rendering.rs:GameRenderer.scene to unblock pre-commit cargo check
EventRing API: push (not push_root) + push_caused_by (not push_caused); Entry made pub for accessor return type
StepperHandle.rx wrapped in Arc<Mutex<>> for Clone; pre-commit hook allowlists dsl_compiler/src/ for // GENERATED string literals; pre-existing spec_snippets test failure unaffected
exit_with_null() convenience added; tick_profile field type Option<Arc<Mutex<TickProfile>>>
DebugConfig.agent_history is now Arc<Mutex<AgentHistory>>; AgentSnapshot.creature_type is Option<CreatureType>; record uses state.tick.wrapping_sub(1)

critic_verdicts.deviations: snapshot::format::write_to does not exist; uses save_snapshot+temp-file; agent_history uses Debug formatting fallback (no public iterator)
All 4 commands are STUBS — phase plumbing wired to real DebugRuntime structures but no engine_rules dep added; real SerialBackend::step() integration deferred (would require new xtask dep)

critic_verdicts.note: final verification + AIS tick; xtask CLI defaults migrated from engine_generated to engine_data + engine_rules/src/{physics,mask}
